records.population: Pregnant and breastfeeding people in Australia
verifiedBoundaries: Influenza risk is distinguished from a self-limiting cold
Medicine questions are directed to a doctor or pharmacist

records.population: People who are pregnant or planning pregnancy
verifiedBoundaries: Medicine decisions depend on individual circumstances
Professional advice is required before starting, stopping or changing medicines
notExtractedForReaderUse: Safety classification for a specific ingredient

records.population: People who are breastfeeding and their infants
verifiedBoundaries: Pregnancy safety does not establish breastfeeding safety
New medicines should be checked with a health professional

records.population: Health professionals treating pregnant people in Australia
verifiedBoundaries: Categories are not an alphabetical safety ranking
The database is not a substitute for professional advice

records.population: Pregnant and breastfeeding people with common-cold symptoms
verifiedBoundaries: Current located version supersedes older web-indexed copies
Specialist factsheet rather than a systematic review
Inactivated influenza vaccination is the pregnancy-specific scope
